# mlops-sentinel

Production-style monitoring starter for ML inference traffic.

## Implemented

- FastAPI backend with:
  - POST /log
  - GET /metrics (Prometheus format)
  - GET /summary (last 100 logs + drift flag)
  - GET /health
- React dashboard with live latency and prediction charts
- Drift banner when rolling confidence drops
- Docker Compose stack with Prometheus

## Quick Start

```bash
docker compose up
```

Dashboard: http://localhost:4173

Prometheus: http://localhost:9090

API: http://localhost:8000
